3. To anyone, in response to request for directory information, unless

the student has opted out.

4. To UMD school ofﬁcials determined to have a legitimate educational interest. They may access student education records within the scope of performing their job duties. A school ofﬁcial has a legitimate educational interest if the ofﬁcial is: a. Performing a task that has been assigned as part of their duties or a position description or contract.

b. Performing a task related to a student’s education.

c. Performing a task related to the discipline of a student.

d. Providing a service or beneﬁt relating to the student’s family, such
